Patch Set 11:

Just spotted one missed impact:
The file for the substitution mapping node type which we are no longer generating when doNotExtendBaseType to true, is still being included in the imports in the service template file, e.g.:

imports:
- service-testService-interface:
    file: service-testService-template-interface.yml

This should not be included in the imports when doNotExtendBaseType to true.

Also, please rebase
